name: fyp-skin-treatment-system
description: Skin Treatment Appointment System — MERN FYP (Monorepo)
author: Muhammad Salman & Mahrukh

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
